top_signals.title: ECB recruits digital euro critics for pilot
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bank, DZ Bank and Groupe BPCE among 36 institutions selected for test of digital currency next year
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Government accelerates social media crackdown with midnight curfews
top_signals.summary: Teenagers will face a default midnight social media curfew and stripped-back social media feeds under the government’s latest crackdown on addictive online features – but they will be able to switch the restrictions off themselves. Tech secretary Liz Kendall has announced social media platforms will disable auto-play and infinite scroll-style recommendations and restrict overnight access [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Recommendations of the Transatlantic Taskforce for Markets of the Future
top_signals.summary: Recommendations of the Transatlantic Taskforce for Markets of the Future to advance UK-US financial services collaboration on digital assets and capital markets

top_signals.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued a postmortem on a data leak in which a contractor published dozens of internal CISA credentials -- including AWS Govcloud keys -- in a public GitHub repository for almost six months before being notified by KrebsOnSecurity. Experts say the gaps identified in the agency's initial response provide important lessons that all security teams should absorb.
